title: VirtualDeviceManager mirror display input injection targets physical display
notes: Two paths for input injection to physical display: (1) VDM-1: INJECT_EVENTS permission bypasses ALL display ownership checks in checkVirtualInputDeviceDisplayIdAssociation (line 1622). (2) VDM-2: Mirror display path - getTargetDisplayIdForInput (line 1430) follows mirror chains to physical display. checkVirtualInputDeviceDisplayIdAssociation explicitly allows mirror displays (line 1629: isMirror() passes untrusted check). App with CREATE_VIRTUAL_DEVICE + CDM NEARBY_DEVICE_STREAMING association can create mirror of default display and inject touch/key events. No user-visible indication.
